item.title: Becton, Dickinson and Company: Swan-Ganz Pacing Catheter, Models: D200F7; Recall
item.summary: Catheters may, due to a manufacturing process and material changes, leak/break from the (blue) proximal injectate lumen hub, which may lead to infection, medication loss, and/or blood loss. Product details: Swan-Ganz Pacing Catheter, Models: D200F7;
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide - US Nationwide distribution including in the states of TX, SC, CT, GA, VA, MO, NM, UT, NJ, CA, FL, PA, IN, TN, WA, KY, MD, WV, MI, MA, NC, MN, NY, AZ, AL, LA, CO, OK, HI, MS, IL, OH, NE, DC, KS, NV, WI, SD, IA, AR, ID, OR, WY, MT, RI, VT, DE, AK, NH, ND, ME, PR and the countries of Japan, Brazil, Colombia, Australia, New Zealand, Poland, Czech Republic, South Africa, Mauritius, Germany, Israel, Iran, Slovakia, Switzerland, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Cyprus, Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates (UAE), Kuwait, Malta, Bahrain, Qatar, Hungary, Morocco, Romania, Lebanon, Tunisia, Oman, Turkey, Austria, Belgium, Luxembourg, France, Netherlands, Italy, Spain, Canary Islands, Portugal, United Kingdom, Northern Ireland, Ireland, Denmark, Sweden, Iceland, Norway, Estonia, Finland, Greece, Chile, Puerto Rico, Canada.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
